findings: FP16 residual 726 MB vs FP32 728 MB — nearly identical
B200 FP16 residual = 269 MB more than A100 FP16 463 MB

security_issues.description: 726 MB FP16 half-precision data remains after cleanup. 269 MB more than A100 FP16 residual of 457 MB. Highest FP16 residual across all architectures.

conclusion: B200 FP16 residual = 726 MB. Nearly identical to FP32 728 MB. Residual not precision-dependent on B200 unlike A100.
